tabs.content:
// =============================================================================
// LOG ANALYTICS RAW TABLE QUERIES (AppDependencies)
// Use these when querying Log Analytics workspace directly
// Schema: TimeGenerated, Properties, DurationMs, Success, AppRoleName
// =============================================================================


// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 28. [LA] FOUNDRY AGENT INVENTORY
// Lists all Foundry agents with their blueprints, projects, and last activity
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    blueprint_id = tostring(Properties["microsoft.a365.agent.blueprint.id"]),
    project_id = tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry.project.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    operation = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.operation.name"])
| summarize 
    last_seen = max(TimeGenerated),
    first_seen = min(TimeGenerated),
    invocations = count(),
    models_used = make_set(model)
  by agent_id, blueprint_id, project_id
| order by last_seen desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 29. [LA] FOUNDRY AGENT PERFORMANCE
// Latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99), success rates, throughput per agent
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    success_count = countif(Success == true),
    failed_count = countif(Success == false),
    p50_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    p99_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 99),
    avg_ms = avg(DurationMs),
    max_ms = max(DurationMs)
  by agent_id, model
| extend 
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    status = case(
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.99, "Healthy",
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.95, "Degraded",
        "Critical"
    )
| project agent_id, model, status, success_rate_pct, invocations, 
          p50_ms, p95_ms, p99_ms, avg_ms, max_ms, failed_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 30. [LA] FOUNDRY AGENT PERFORMANCE OVER TIME
// Time-series latency and throughput for trend analysis
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    p50_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    success_count = countif(Success == true)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), agent_id
| extend success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, agent_id, invocations, p50_ms, p95_ms, success_rate_pct
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 31. [LA] FOUNDRY TOKEN USAGE
// Input/output tokens per agent, per model, with hourly breakdown
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    cached_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens"])
| where isnotnull(input_tokens) or isnotnull(output_tokens)
| summarize 
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    total_cached_tokens = sum(cached_tokens),
    invocations = count(),
    avg_input_tokens = avg(input_tokens),
    avg_output_tokens = avg(output_tokens)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), agent_id, model
| extend total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens
| project TimeGenerated, agent_id, model, invocations, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cached_tokens, total_tokens,
          avg_input_tokens, avg_output_tokens
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 32. [LA] FOUNDRY TOKEN USAGE SUMMARY
// Aggregated token consumption per agent and model (for cost analysis)
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    cached_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens"])
| where isnotnull(input_tokens) or isnotnull(output_tokens)
| summarize 
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    total_cached_tokens = sum(cached_tokens),
    invocations = count()
  by agent_id, model
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    avg_tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations
// Estimated cost (GPT-4o pricing: $2.50/1M input, $10.00/1M output)
| extend 
    estimated_cost_usd = round(
        (todouble(total_input_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + 
        (todouble(total_output_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 10.00), 4
    )
| project agent_id, model, invocations, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cached_tokens, 
          total_tokens, avg_tokens_per_call, estimated_cost_usd
| order by total_tokens desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 33. [LA] FOUNDRY MODEL USAGE BREAKDOWN
// Distribution of requests across models with efficiency metrics
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(DurationMs),
    p95_duration_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    success_count = countif(Success == true),
    stop_count = countif(finish_reason has "stop"),
    content_filter_count = countif(finish_reason has "content_filter")
  by model
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations,
    output_input_ratio = round(todouble(total_output_tokens) / total_input_tokens, 2)
| project model, invocations, success_rate_pct, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, tokens_per_call,
          output_input_ratio, avg_duration_ms, p95_duration_ms,
          stop_count, content_filter_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 34. [LA] FOUNDRY I/O MESSAGE LOGGING
// Extract input prompts and output responses (parsed from JSON)
// WARNING: May contain sensitive data - use with appropriate access controls
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    response_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.id"]),
    input_messages_raw = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.input.messages"]),
    output_messages_raw = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.output.messages"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
// Parse JSON to extract message content
| extend 
    input_messages = parse_json(input_messages_raw),
    output_messages = parse_json(output_messages_raw)
// Extract user message (last user message in input array)
| extend 
    user_message = tostring(input_messages[-1].parts[0].content),
    system_prompt = tostring(input_messages[0].parts[0].content),
    assistant_response = tostring(output_messages[0].parts[0].content)
| project TimeGenerated, agent_id, model, response_id, DurationMs,
          system_prompt, user_message, assistant_response,
          finish_reason, input_tokens, output_tokens
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 35. [LA] FOUNDRY I/O MESSAGE SUMMARY
// Compact view: truncated messages for quick review
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_messages_raw = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.input.messages"]),
    output_messages_raw = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.output.messages"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| extend 
    input_messages = parse_json(input_messages_raw),
    output_messages = parse_json(output_messages_raw)
| extend 
    user_query = substring(tostring(input_messages[-1].parts[0].content), 0, 200),
    response_preview = substring(tostring(output_messages[0].parts[0].content), 0, 300)
| project TimeGenerated, agent_id, model, DurationMs,
          user_query, response_preview, input_tokens, output_tokens
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 36. [LA] FOUNDRY AGENT ACTIVITY TIMELINE
// Time-series view of agent invocations for trend analysis
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_tokens = sum(input_tokens) + sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(DurationMs),
    unique_agents = dcount(agent_id)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 37. [LA] FOUNDRY AGENT ACTIVITY BY AGENT
// Per-agent time-series for individual agent monitoring
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_tokens = sum(input_tokens) + sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(DurationMs),
    success_rate = round(todouble(countif(Success == true)) * 100.0 / count(), 2)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), agent_id
| order by TimeGenerated desc, agent_id

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 38. [LA] FOUNDRY CONTROL ROOM SUMMARY
// Single aggregated view combining key metrics per agent for dashboard tiles
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    blueprint_id = tostring(Properties["microsoft.a365.agent.blueprint.id"]),
    model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    // Availability & Performance
    invocations = count(),
    success_count = countif(Success == true),
    failed_count = countif(Success == false),
    p50_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    // Token Usage
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    // Activity Window
    first_seen = min(TimeGenerated),
    last_seen = max(TimeGenerated),
    // Finish Reasons
    stop_count = countif(finish_reason has "stop"),
    content_filter_count = countif(finish_reason has "content_filter"),
    // Model diversity
    models_used = make_set(model)
  by agent_id, blueprint_id
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    avg_tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations,
    // Estimated cost (GPT-4o pricing)
    estimated_cost_usd = round(
        (todouble(total_input_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + 
        (todouble(total_output_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 10.00), 4
    ),
    status = case(
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.99, "ðŸŸ¢ Healthy",
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.95, "ðŸŸ¡ Degraded",
        "ðŸ”´ Critical"
    )
| project agent_id, blueprint_id, status, success_rate_pct,
          invocations, failed_count, p50_ms, p95_ms,
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, avg_tokens_per_call,
          estimated_cost_usd, first_seen, last_seen, models_used,
          stop_count, content_filter_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 39. [LA] FOUNDRY FINISH REASONS ANALYSIS
// Track behavioral drift via finish reasons distribution
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| where isnotempty(finish_reason)
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), agent_id, finish_reason
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 40. [LA] FOUNDRY RAW TELEMETRY EXPLORER
// Explore all available Properties fields for a Foundry agent span
// Use this to discover additional attributes your agents emit
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where tostring(Properties["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(Properties["span_type"]) == "agent"
| take 5
| project TimeGenerated, Name, Type, DurationMs, Success, Properties
tabs.title: aictt-law

// =============================================================================
// MICROSOFT FOUNDRY AGENT TELEMETRY QUERIES
// Filter: microsoft.foundry == "True" AND span_type == "agent"
// =============================================================================

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 15. FOUNDRY AGENT INVENTORY
// Lists all Foundry agents with their blueprints, projects, and last activity
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    blueprint_id = tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.a365.agent.blueprint.id"]),
    project_id = tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry.project.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    operation = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.operation.name"])
| summarize 
    last_seen = max(timestamp),
    first_seen = min(timestamp),
    invocations = count(),
    models_used = make_set(model)
  by agent_id, blueprint_id, project_id
| order by last_seen desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 16. FOUNDRY AGENT PERFORMANCE
// Latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99), success rates, throughput per agent
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    success_count = countif(success == true),
    failed_count = countif(success == false),
    p50_ms = percentile(duration, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95),
    p99_ms = percentile(duration, 99),
    avg_ms = avg(duration),
    max_ms = max(duration)
  by agent_id, model
| extend 
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    status = case(
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.99, "Healthy",
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.95, "Degraded",
        "Critical"
    )
| project agent_id, model, status, success_rate_pct, invocations, 
          p50_ms, p95_ms, p99_ms, avg_ms, max_ms, failed_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 17. FOUNDRY AGENT PERFORMANCE OVER TIME
// Time-series latency and throughput for trend analysis
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    p50_ms = percentile(duration, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95),
    success_count = countif(success == true)
  by bin(timestamp, 1h), agent_id
| extend success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2)
| project timestamp, agent_id, invocations, p50_ms, p95_ms, success_rate_pct
| order by timestamp desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 18. FOUNDRY TOKEN USAGE
// Input/output tokens per agent, per model, with hourly breakdown
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    cached_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens"])
| where isnotnull(input_tokens) or isnotnull(output_tokens)
| summarize 
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    total_cached_tokens = sum(cached_tokens),
    invocations = count(),
    avg_input_tokens = avg(input_tokens),
    avg_output_tokens = avg(output_tokens)
  by bin(timestamp, 1h), agent_id, model
| extend total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens
| project timestamp, agent_id, model, invocations, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cached_tokens, total_tokens,
          avg_input_tokens, avg_output_tokens
| order by timestamp desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 19. FOUNDRY TOKEN USAGE SUMMARY
// Aggregated token consumption per agent and model (for cost analysis)
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    cached_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens"])
| where isnotnull(input_tokens) or isnotnull(output_tokens)
| summarize 
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    total_cached_tokens = sum(cached_tokens),
    invocations = count()
  by agent_id, model
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    avg_tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations
// Estimated cost (GPT-4o pricing: $2.50/1M input, $10.00/1M output)
| extend 
    estimated_cost_usd = round(
        (todouble(total_input_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + 
        (todouble(total_output_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 10.00), 4
    )
| project agent_id, model, invocations, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cached_tokens, 
          total_tokens, avg_tokens_per_call, estimated_cost_usd
| order by total_tokens desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 20. FOUNDRY MODEL USAGE BREAKDOWN
// Distribution of requests across models with efficiency metrics
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(duration),
    p95_duration_ms = percentile(duration, 95),
    success_count = countif(success == true),
    stop_count = countif(finish_reason has "stop"),
    content_filter_count = countif(finish_reason has "content_filter")
  by model
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations,
    output_input_ratio = round(todouble(total_output_tokens) / total_input_tokens, 2)
| project model, invocations, success_rate_pct, 
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, tokens_per_call,
          output_input_ratio, avg_duration_ms, p95_duration_ms,
          stop_count, content_filter_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 21. FOUNDRY I/O MESSAGE LOGGING
// Extract input prompts and output responses (parsed from JSON)
// WARNING: May contain sensitive data - use with appropriate access controls
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    response_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.id"]),
    input_messages_raw = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.input.messages"]),
    output_messages_raw = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.output.messages"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
// Parse JSON to extract message content
| extend 
    input_messages = parse_json(input_messages_raw),
    output_messages = parse_json(output_messages_raw)
// Extract user message (last user message in input array)
| extend 
    user_message = tostring(input_messages[-1].parts[0].content),
    system_prompt = tostring(input_messages[0].parts[0].content),
    assistant_response = tostring(output_messages[0].parts[0].content)
| project timestamp, agent_id, model, response_id, duration,
          system_prompt, user_message, assistant_response,
          finish_reason, input_tokens, output_tokens
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 22. FOUNDRY I/O MESSAGE SUMMARY
// Compact view: truncated messages for quick review
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_messages_raw = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.input.messages"]),
    output_messages_raw = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.output.messages"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| extend 
    input_messages = parse_json(input_messages_raw),
    output_messages = parse_json(output_messages_raw)
| extend 
    user_query = substring(tostring(input_messages[-1].parts[0].content), 0, 200),
    response_preview = substring(tostring(output_messages[0].parts[0].content), 0, 300)
| project timestamp, agent_id, model, duration,
          user_query, response_preview, input_tokens, output_tokens
| order by timestamp desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 23. FOUNDRY AGENT ACTIVITY TIMELINE
// Time-series view of agent invocations for trend analysis
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_tokens = sum(input_tokens) + sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(duration),
    unique_agents = dcount(agent_id)
  by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 24. FOUNDRY AGENT ACTIVITY BY AGENT
// Per-agent time-series for individual agent monitoring
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize 
    invocations = count(),
    total_tokens = sum(input_tokens) + sum(output_tokens),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(duration),
    success_rate = round(todouble(countif(success == true)) * 100.0 / count(), 2)
  by bin(timestamp, 1h), agent_id
| order by timestamp desc, agent_id

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 25. FOUNDRY CONTROL ROOM SUMMARY
// Single aggregated view combining key metrics per agent for dashboard tiles
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    blueprint_id = tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.a365.agent.blueprint.id"]),
    model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
    input_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
    output_tokens = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| summarize 
    // Availability & Performance
    invocations = count(),
    success_count = countif(success == true),
    failed_count = countif(success == false),
    p50_ms = percentile(duration, 50),
    p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95),
    // Token Usage
    total_input_tokens = sum(input_tokens),
    total_output_tokens = sum(output_tokens),
    // Activity Window
    first_seen = min(timestamp),
    last_seen = max(timestamp),
    // Finish Reasons
    stop_count = countif(finish_reason has "stop"),
    content_filter_count = countif(finish_reason has "content_filter"),
    // Model diversity
    models_used = make_set(model)
  by agent_id, blueprint_id
| extend 
    total_tokens = total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens,
    success_rate_pct = round(todouble(success_count) * 100.0 / invocations, 2),
    avg_tokens_per_call = (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens) / invocations,
    // Estimated cost (GPT-4o pricing)
    estimated_cost_usd = round(
        (todouble(total_input_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + 
        (todouble(total_output_tokens) / 1000000.0 * 10.00), 4
    ),
    status = case(
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.99, "ðŸŸ¢ Healthy",
        todouble(success_count) / invocations >= 0.95, "ðŸŸ¡ Degraded",
        "ðŸ”´ Critical"
    )
| project agent_id, blueprint_id, status, success_rate_pct,
          invocations, failed_count, p50_ms, p95_ms,
          total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, avg_tokens_per_call,
          estimated_cost_usd, first_seen, last_seen, models_used,
          stop_count, content_filter_count
| order by invocations desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 26. FOUNDRY FINISH REASONS ANALYSIS
// Track behavioral drift via finish reasons distribution
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
let timeWindow = 7d;
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(timeWindow)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| extend 
    agent_id = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
    finish_reason = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.response.finish_reasons"])
| where isnotempty(finish_reason)
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), agent_id, finish_reason
| order by timestamp desc

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// 27. FOUNDRY RAW TELEMETRY EXPLORER
// Explore all available customDimensions fields for a Foundry agent span
// Use this to discover additional attributes your agents emit
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(1d)
| where tostring(customDimensions["microsoft.foundry"]) == "True"
    and tostring(customDimensions["span_type"]) == "agent"
| take 5
| project timestamp, name, type, duration, success, customDimensions
tabs.title: foundry - aictt-ai
